content.question: Do school closures in Hungarian rural areas precede or follow depopulation trends, and is the temporal association replicable with Hungarian data and matching methods comparable to the Finnish DID study?
content.reduction_path: Replicate Finnish 2010-2018 difference-in-differences design using Hungarian settlement-level data for periods covering 2010-2024, with student enrollment and closure dates matched to demographic census and residential permit data; test for leading depopulation in closure communities versus prior trend.
